_comment: Project config — tracked in git. Generated by sdd-sync.sh, enriched by project-scanner/initializer.

deployment._comment: Filled by project-scanner or solution-designer. services = stack files to load (empty = load all).

migration._comment: Only for project_type=migration. Empty for new/existing.

env._comment: Shared values for local development. MCPs read from here. NEVER store secrets — use .sdd-credentials.json instead.
